markdown:
# Defensive Duelist

You gain the following benefits.

## Parry

If you're holding a Finesse weapon and another creature hits you with a melee attack, you can take a [[reaction]] to add your [[proficiency Bonus]] to your [[armor_class Class]], potentially causing the attack to miss you. You gain this bonus to your AC against melee attacks until the start of your next turn.
